programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: With the quota extended and the season stretching longer, the fleet is feeling homesick.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mighty Ships
programme.desc: Norrona ferries passengers, vehicles and million-dollar cargo to Iceland and the Faroe Islands on one of the longest, toughest ferry routes in the world.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mayday
programme.desc: In 1992, Flight 1862 from Amsterdam to Tel Aviv suffered a catastrophic crash; investigators subsequently discover a lethal problem threatening every 747.

programme.desc: A fire breaks out on UPS Flight six; as smoke fills the cockpit, getting the plane to safety is a race against time.

programme.title: Nerve Center
programme.desc: A behind-the-scenes look at the IndyCar Championship at the Las Vegas Motor Speedway which ends with a fiery crash resulting in the death of driver Dan Wheldon.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Outer Banks
programme.desc: The pressure of a dwindling quota is starting to affect the captains, who realize the season could come to a sudden end; as a storm looms, the decision to stay out on the water could be detrimental to the boats battling it out for the top position.

programme.title: Mighty Trains
programme.desc: A trip through Lima details the voyage's breathtaking scenery and engineering challenges.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mighty Trains
programme.desc: A trip aboard the luxury tourist train, Transcantábrico Clásico through Northern Spain along a historic 19th century rail line.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mighty Trains
programme.desc: A trip aboard one of the world's most expensive and sought-after train rides details the journey for both passengers and crew.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mighty Trains
programme.desc: The prairies of Canada; the deserts of Australia; the cold of the Norwegian Arctic Circle; the steepest slopes of the mighty Swiss Alps.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mighty Trains
programme.desc: Exploring Vietnam by rail aboard the Reunification Express; a three-day ride from Hanoi to Ho Chi Minh City rich in views of rivers, rice paddies and dragon fruit orchards; steeped in the nation's war-torn past.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mighty Trains
programme.desc: Travelling up the coast of New Zealand in style aboard the Coastal Pacific, a train that embodies the nation's spirit of grit and determination; for two years, this ride was shut down due to an earthquake in 2016.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Mightiest
programme.desc: Tensions rise as preparations are under way for a first mission; check out the USS Gerald R. Ford, the U.S. Navy's largest aircraft carrier.

programme.title: The Mightiest
programme.desc: There are machines built to take on grueling jobs in grueling weather conditions; NOAA's WP-3D Orion Hurricane Hunters conduct a stressful first real-world test of new drone technology for hurricane analysis.

programme.title: The Mightiest
programme.desc: Planes, trains and ships that sustain life and communities; featuring the Hudson Bay Railway, an important and dangerous route for bringing critical goods to Canada's remote North.
